reviews.review_description: I haven't played it in a while because of personal reasons. When I did play, it was always so fun! I would plan to play just a little while, but always ended up playing way longer. I always wished it had multi player options, so I could play it with my friends and family. Reading the reviews has made me want to play now! Great job, and great game! I think I must go play it now!! 😀

reviews.review_title: Move over Rubik, this cube beats yours
reviews.review_description: Add a clever twist to pool by making the table the inside of a cube, six surfaces, 8 pockets. Add another twist by trading in cues for pistols. It isn't really pool any more, but it's not really not pool either. Whatever, it's a lot of fun.

reviews.review_title: Must play game for those who love Pool
reviews.review_description:
Its the classic game of pool but you can walk around and shoot the balls in from a VR cube pool table. Pretty crazy this is being offered for free, needs to get multiplayer but as it is now I can 100 percent recommend checking it out. Definitely an app lab hidden gem.

Video: https://youtu.be/puI91aQhFZI

developer_response.body: We loved your video! It has actually inspired us to push forward with more features. This is our first game and the more we realize people are enjoying it, the more excited we are to deliver more fun! The official first version with actual "8-ball" rules was just released this week and we plan to release an online multiplayer feature soon where players can challenge their friends and compete online. We can't wait to share it.

reviews.review_description: It’s a super fun game to play. It’s exactly what it looks like, so, if you think the concept of 3D pool is cool, you will also like this game. I didn’t play it for that long because I’ve always got bored quickly in single player games. That being said, this is the single player game that I played for the longest amount of time.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing our game! We just released the official v1.0 with more features and plan to release a multiplayer version very soon. We hope you will continue to enjoy the game as it grows. Your positive feedback has helped fuel or development team, so thanks again for speaking up!

reviews.review_description: Played this today for the first time. I really enjoyed the take on pool. A lot of fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We're glad you are enjoying the game. Try out our new v1.0 release when you get a chance. Next up is online multiplayer!
